evidence: squeeze_long produced 7 VALID_0DTE trades, $604.5 PnL, $344.83 PnL/exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades, worst MAE -194.25, and median MFE 66.3. This is much cleaner than pullback_long, which created the latest -2026.5 MAE slow tail.
name: Squeeze Continuation Upside Capture Holdout
risk: Higher targets may lengthen holds or reduce TP realization, and the stronger slope threshold may remove profitable early squeeze entries.

validation_metric: squeeze_long average PnL and total PnL improve, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, completed trades remain within 10%, PnL/exposure hour stays flat or better, and profile worst MAE remains no worse than roughly -250.
